title: grackle graph
description: Static analysis graph artifact emitted by a StaticParserAdapter. Nodes represent code entities (files, classes, functions, etc.); edges represent relationships (imports, calls, inheritance). Kind fields are open strings per ADR-0004.

GraphNode.description: A node in the analysis graph (file, class, function, method, etc.).

id.description: Stable POSIX-relative node ID. Format: <posix-path>:<qualname>. Scheme settled in Phase 2.A.

kind.description: Open string — see ADR-0004. Common values listed in examples.

name.description: Display name of the code entity (e.g., class or function name).

path.description: POSIX-relative path from the project root. Forward slashes only.

metadata.description: Open metadata bag — shape is kind-specific and adapter-specific.

GraphEdge.description: A directed edge between two nodes.

kind.description: Open string — see ADR-0004. Common values listed in examples.

metadata.description: Open metadata bag — shape is kind-specific and adapter-specific.

Graph.description: Top-level graph artifact produced by a StaticParserAdapter.

language.description: Open string — see ADR-0004. The adapter language key that produced this graph.
